I'm pretty new for this game, pulled Faint at beginner pulls and think I overpulled standart Caro a little...does it worth to waste Protoparadise on her to get +4 and super Ult?it doesn't looks like too OP by description. 

And I got that priest randomly, I think he's limited,and his enlights make him kinda damage dealer? Should I spend that limited replicator in him and pull some dps wheel for him? Cuz his stone bonk 2 mana cost damages more than Lotan exalt if Furnace full... Don't know what team should I build, Salvador kinda tank damaging more than Lotan assault distract me a little xd
Don't use dupes on em
You pull one Xu with Myriam and run Xu Agrippa (e2) Myriam Faros (e3)
Save limited dupes for next units
No
Faint works at e0
Her oe doesnt do much for you
Could replace Faros with aigis or faint if need dr/stun or just don't pull for Faros as you'll change that team anyway
Also no for salvador
Once next banners come
He needs e2 but even with e2, he's very slow
By the time you deal dmg, you'll probably see the next triple rerun banner
Mouchette whom you probably have is going to be your best carry at e2
She's worth investing more

Mouchette is from latest banner? Nope, downloaded a 2days ago. Right now on ch4 and thinking of some working team. Cuz mobs stop dying from priest falling stone and passive Faint reflect at turn1 xd and event bosses at same lvl are kinda tough to deal. Lack of dmg mostly, I stocked too much def I think. Shields, dmg reduction, I don't die but Salvador and Lotan needs half a hour to kill lvl 43 event buddies xd

Okay currently, there are no particularly strong dps
One sec

Okay a few things. Supporters wise follow this guy and your event should be easy

100109619
Lotan is a particularly strong dps. Also you're progressing quite fast fir 2 days new player

Currently on banner are these units.

Xu - mainly a poison support, nice to have 1 copy (e0)

Dore- a decent carry early game. He scales badly with investments, do not summon more than 1 copy.

Daff - not much comments 

Myriam - a good aq support .

Are you interested in any of these?
Daff - a jack of all trait dps that is difficult to play, and need investment
Sorry is NOT a particularly strong dps
Lotan sucks without ssr wheels
and oe

It seems like all banner characters need some pack of others to be good. I googled some and it's like Myriam is pure support(but scale from crit dmg lol) for mono Lemurian (don't know who's that, may be full tentacled ones) 
Doresain need many kills, so summoner bosses like that Wax golems and Thais {looks like she's must have in any Caro pack) 
Daffodil... I don't understand her. It's kinda universal but it's looks like u need at least e2 to put her to work. And u need long run to get Crit up and Skull do bonk truly hard.
Okay actually decent research
daff doesnt rely too much on the crit, its a nice bonus but her main thing is being one of the best poison and counter appliers
she needs OE for the sick combo setups
Tbh i think for a good experience, dore is probably best but he falls off a cliff at ch7

First off try running r wheels like gluttony, frenzy, emerge

relics are super op in arc 1 so buy the ones that give crit rate and stuff and enjoy massive dps increase
Doresain will no diff arc 1 arc 2 and falls off in like arc 2 hard mode
he just oneshots mobs and 2 shots bosses
I think he can be played as long as it's before Alert 5 or hard mode chapter 8 or something
hard mode arc 2 not even that bad for invested dore
since all the bosses are made for glazing him
Dont invest in dore tbh
every arc 2 boss spawns free snacks
E0 dore functions the same as e1 anw
And somewhat e2

Dropped 20x limited shards to Daff banner and got her, is she for counter with...eee... Nautila Winkle? Or for poison with...Myriam,Faros? Didn't think she will work as pure dmg carry with 4 cost Exalts

she has the jack of all trades thing going there, Nautila Pandia Daff with winkle will work for a counter comp on certian content just fine.
needs E2 to function and OE to pop off with the combos
there are a few poison routes but people are liking the xu one
u guys think Xu's wheel is a good E3 Timeloop candidate or should i stick with GDoll???
for the team itself, i really like Xu's team compare all kinds of GDoll team since she's usually a leftover in D-tide
but obv, Xu's wheel is only for Xu while GDoll's is a bit universal
Does Daff need her wheel?) Seems like not but I don't sure
who goes in the last slot?

Lily/Nautila/Pandia - Casiah/Clementine - Horla/GDoll

I do not recommend pairing her with 24, it's a whale glass cannon team
I strongly recommend using Casiah if your Daff doesn't have OE, cause otherwise you're either getting one mirage per exalt or fully rely on ultra turn
Out of all the options for the first slot, Lily performs the best by far

There is an option to use her with Xu, though I'm still experimenting with team compositions
Xu - Castor - Erica feels the most consistent so far, though it does struggle with a lack of strength generation

Her best wheel combination is Sunfall + Blade of the Titan, her signature is not needed
As an alternative for Sunfall, Twisted Knight Ballad works well too
If your Blade isn't +12 yet, just use Analysis of Death with it
Hey, how would yall build this team?
The wheel isn't necessary, she can use other wheels and likes bonus damage a lot too
she does like sunfall a lot but that's a paid wheel
